variants: Flavien Bouyx specializes in civil engineering and is a proud member of the Vaporveil Steamwrights. His research and projects often receive support from the Curio Pathmakers Council, which serves as his primary funding source. Through his contributions, he continues to make a significant impact in the field of civil engineering.
